creator: benoit@guillemaud.fr
text:
Hello,

A new update for Plex Media Server is available !

Changelog in the Plex forums : https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/631

Update available here : https://downloads.plex.tv/plex-media-server-new/1.40.4.8679-424562606/freebsd/PlexMediaServer-1.40.4.8679-424562606-FreeBSD-amd64.tar.bz2

Thanks you :-)

Best regards
